appliedUpdates.description: Added api_psql_dev and api_psql_test commands to easily query the databases directly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the initialization commands. Some workers use `.factory/init.sh` while others manually run the docker compose commands from the `api-foundation-worker` skill. Enforce a standard.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `contracts-zod-v4-migration` diverged from standard skill procedure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure future workers know that the generated Sardius scaffold misses the `google-auth-library` dependency and requires a manual `prisma generate` step before the dev server can start. (This may already be addressed by recent chore commits, but raised here for safety).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature `sardius-scaffold` had to dynamically discover and fix this.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pre-existing lint warnings in e2e/validator-public-docs-group-1.spec.ts and e2e/validator-public-docs-group-2.spec.ts.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not a shared state gap, just project tech debt to be resolved by a future task if requested.
